mapper.sql: mockexam_answer_asset_id, owner_type, owner_id, user_id, mockexam_paper_ref_id, mockexam_question_ref_id, asset_type, file_name, mime_type, source_path, storage_path, asset_url, file_hash, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mockexam_answer_asset WHERE owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, mockexam_answer_asset_id ASC
SELECT FROM mockexam_answer_asset WHERE mockexam_question_ref_id = #{questionRefId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY create_time DESC, mockexam_answer_asset_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE mockexam_answer_asset SET status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE mockexam_answer_asset_id = #{answerAssetId}
